sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 17:14 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem840_confirm_autonomy_and_scheduler.json')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
created_files=[]
if not missing and prev.get('autonomy_confirmed') is True:
    status='autonomy_confirmed_process_protocol_next'
    next_action='process real Claude response and produce agreed protocol'
elif 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_dispatch_result_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 repair missing dispatch result proof after BEM-840 autonomy check','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='repair_dispatch_result_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify workflow_dispatch_results'
elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_claude_runtime_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 repair missing Claude runtime proof after BEM-840 autonomy check','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='repair_claude_runtime_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify Claude runtime state'
elif 'real_claude_response' in missing:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_real_response_retry.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 retry real Claude response after BEM-840 autonomy check','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='repair_real_response_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real Claude response'
else:
    status='autonomy_state_unknown_diagnose_next'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-840 state because missing list is absent or malformed'
state={'bem':'BEM-841','status':status,'bem840_status':prev.get('status'),'bem840_autonomy_confirmed':prev.get('autonomy_confirmed'),'bem840_scheduler_checked':prev.get('scheduler_checked'),'bem840_can_self_check_mailbox':prev.get('can_self_check_mailbox'),'missing':missing,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem841_continue_after_autonomy_check.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem841_continue_after_autonomy_check.md').write_text('# BEM-841 | Continue After Autonomy Check | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-841'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem841_continue_after_autonomy_check.json','governance/reports/bem841_continue_after_autonomy_check.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Continued after autonomy check by queuing the next repair for the first missing proof or protocol processing if autonomy is confirmed')
